---
title: "plotoptions"
output: html_document
date: "2024-11-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(here)
source(here("scripts", "01_packages.R"))
source(here("scripts", "02b_definedelays.R"))
source(here("R", "funcs_plots.R"))
source(here("R", "funcs_data.R"))
source(here("R", "generate_scores_func.R"))
source(here("R", "lshtm_theme.R"))
source(here("R", "plots_baseline.R"))
source(here("scripts", "datacollect.R"))
library(patchwork)
```

## Plot option 1
### Would be good to plot the CRPS contributions from over, underprediction, dispersion

```{r load_and_score}
disease <- "ebola"

# Scenario mapping
scenarios <- c("const_low", "const_high", "inc", "dec")
sim_data_suffix <- c(const_low = "const_low", const_high = "const_hi",
                     inc = "inc", dec = "dec")
scen_labels <- c(const_low = "const_low", const_high = "const_high",
                 inc = "inc", dec = "dec")

# Load Rt trajectory for this disease for the low, high, inc, dec scenarios
rt_traj_list <- read_latest(here("data"), paste0("rt_traj_list_", disease))

# Get start date for filtering
startdate <- startenddates[[disease]]$startdate

# Load sim data and Rt trajectories per scenario
sim_data_list <- list()

for (scen in scenarios) {
  sim_data_list[[scen]] <- read_latest(here("data"),
    paste0(disease, "_sim_data_", sim_data_suffix[scen])) |>
    mutate(scen = scen)

}

rt_traj_scen <- bind_rows(rt_traj_list)
sim_data_scen <- bind_rows(sim_data_list)

# Load results and generate scores (one scenario at a time to manage memory)
scores_cases_list <- list()
scores_rt_list <- list()

for (scen in scenarios) {
  res_samples <- read_latest(here("results/sim"),
    paste0("res_", disease, "_", scen, "_latest_all_samples"))
  res_R <- read_latest(here("results/sim"),
    paste0("res_", disease, "_", scen, "_latest_all_R"))
  res_id <- read_latest(here("results/sim"),
    paste0("res_", disease, "_", scen, "_latest_all_id"))

  res_samples <- res_samples |> filter(date <= as.Date(startdate) + 6*4*7)
  res_R <- res_R |> filter(date <= as.Date(startdate) + 6*4*7)

  scores_cases_list[[scen]] <- generate_scores_cases(res_samples, res_id,
    sim_data_list[[scen]]) |> mutate(scen = scen)
  scores_rt_list[[scen]] <- generate_scores_rt(res_R, res_id,
    rt_traj_scen |> filter(scen == !!scen)) |> mutate(scen = scen)

}

scores_cases <- bind_rows(scores_cases_list)
scores_rt <- bind_rows(scores_rt_list)

# Add scenario labels
scen_labs <- data.frame(scen = scenarios,
                        rt_traj = scenarios,
                        rt_opts = "latest",
                        ur = "No under-reporting")

rt_traj_scen <- rt_traj_scen |> left_join(scen_labs, by = "scen")
sim_data_scen <- sim_data_scen |> left_join(scen_labs, by = "scen")
scores_cases <- scores_cases |> left_join(scen_labs, by = "scen")
scores_rt <- scores_rt |> left_join(scen_labs, by = "scen")
```


## Full Rt plots

```{r timeseries_r, echo=FALSE}
for (scen in scenarios) {
  res_R_scen <- read_latest(here("results/sim"),
    paste0("res_", disease, "_", scen, "_latest_all_R"))
  res_id_scen <- read_latest(here("results/sim"),
    paste0("res_", disease, "_", scen, "_latest_all_id"))
  rt_dis_scen <- rt_traj_scen |> filter(scen == !!scen)
  scores_scen_rt <- scores_rt |> filter(scen == !!scen)

  rtplot <- plot_baseline_rt(res_R_scen, res_id_scen, rt_dis_scen,
                             scores_scen_rt, 4)

  ggsave(here("figures", paste0("rtbaselineplot_", disease, "_", scen, ".png")),
         rtplot$final_plot, width = 13.5, height = 8.5)

  # Keep only the small sub-plots needed for combining_heatmaps
  assign(paste0("rtbaselineplot_", scen), list(
    barchart_mean_gen_time = rtplot$barchart_mean_gen_time,
    barchart_mean_inc_period = rtplot$barchart_mean_inc_period
  ))

  rm(rtplot, res_R_scen, res_id_scen, rt_dis_scen, scores_scen_rt)
  gc()
}
```


```{r timeseries_cases, echo=FALSE}
for (scen in scenarios) {
  res_samples_scen <- read_latest(here("results/sim"),
    paste0("res_", disease, "_", scen, "_latest_all_samples"))
  res_id_scen <- read_latest(here("results/sim"),
    paste0("res_", disease, "_", scen, "_latest_all_id"))
  sim_data_s <- sim_data_scen |> filter(scen == !!scen)
  scores_scen_cases <- scores_cases |> filter(scen == !!scen)

  caseplot <- plot_baseline_cases(res_samples_scen, res_id_scen, sim_data_s,
                                  scores_scen_cases, 4)

  ggsave(here("figures", paste0("casebaselineplot_", disease, "_", scen, ".png")),
         caseplot$final_plot, width = 13.5, height = 8.5)

  # Keep only the small sub-plots needed for combining_heatmaps
  assign(paste0("casebaselineplot_", scen), list(
    barchart_mean_gen_time = caseplot$barchart_mean_gen_time,
    barchart_mean_inc_period = caseplot$barchart_mean_inc_period,
    timeseries = caseplot$timeseries
  ))

  rm(caseplot, res_samples_scen, res_id_scen, sim_data_s, scores_scen_cases)
  gc()
}
```

```{r combining_heatmaps, echo=FALSE}
rt_barchartgentime_low <- rtbaselineplot_const_low$barchart_mean_gen_time + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))
rt_barchartgentime_high <- rtbaselineplot_const_high$barchart_mean_gen_time + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))
rt_barchartgentime_inc <- rtbaselineplot_inc$barchart_mean_gen_time + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))
rt_barchartgentime_dec <- rtbaselineplot_dec$barchart_mean_gen_time + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))

rt_barchartincperiod_low <- rtbaselineplot_const_low$barchart_mean_inc_period + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))
rt_barchartincperiod_high <- rtbaselineplot_const_high$barchart_mean_inc_period + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))
rt_barchartincperiod_inc <- rtbaselineplot_inc$barchart_mean_inc_period + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))
rt_barchartincperiod_dec <- rtbaselineplot_dec$barchart_mean_inc_period + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))

case_barchartgentime_low <- casebaselineplot_const_low$barchart_mean_gen_time + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))
case_barchartgentime_high <- casebaselineplot_const_high$barchart_mean_gen_time + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))
case_barchartgentime_inc <- casebaselineplot_inc$barchart_mean_gen_time + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))
case_barchartgentime_dec <- casebaselineplot_dec$barchart_mean_gen_time + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))

case_barchartincperiod_low <- casebaselineplot_const_low$barchart_mean_inc_period + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))
case_barchartincperiod_high <- casebaselineplot_const_high$barchart_mean_inc_period + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))
case_barchartincperiod_inc <- casebaselineplot_inc$barchart_mean_inc_period + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))
case_barchartincperiod_dec <- casebaselineplot_dec$barchart_mean_inc_period + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=20))

## Combine timeseries
casetimeseries_low <- casebaselineplot_const_low$timeseries + ggtitle("Rt constant - low")
casetimeseries_high <- casebaselineplot_const_high$timeseries + ggtitle("Rt constant - high")
casetimeseries_inc <- casebaselineplot_inc$timeseries + ggtitle("Rt increasing")
casetimeseries_dec <- casebaselineplot_dec$timeseries + ggtitle("Rt decreasing")

timeseries <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  casetimeseries_low, casetimeseries_high,
  casetimeseries_inc, casetimeseries_dec,
  ncol = 2
)
```
